creator: jase@FreeBSD.org
text:
On 17/07/2012 15:03, Jase Thew wrote:

> Please regenerate the patches against the version of net-mgmt/zabbix
> that was in the official ports tree at the time of your PR submission
> (specifically, 1.8.13,2).

To correct myself, I did of course mean net-mgmt/zabbix-server.

Regards,

Jase.
